Background.occupation: Freelance social media content creator and occasional gig worker for food delivery apps
Background.social_class: Middle class, living in a rented apartment in a suburban area
Background.key_experience: Lost a stable office job during the pandemic, which led to reliance on gig economy work and increased online engagement for income and social connection
